name: TinyLlama 1.1B Chat
description: Compact 1.1B parameter model optimized for speed, low memory footprint, and quick responses.

name: SmolLM2 1.7B Instruct
description: High-efficiency state-of-the-art small language model trained on curated synthetic data.

name: Qwen 2.5 0.5B Instruct
description: Alibaba Cloud's ultra-lightweight model with massive 32K context length.

name: Qwen 2.5 1.5B Instruct
description: Exceptional general reasoning, coding, and multilingual performance for its size.

name: Qwen 2.5 3B Instruct
description: Near 7B class intelligence with half the memory footprint.

name: Gemma 3 1B IT
description: Google's lightweight model built from Gemini technology for instruction following.

name: Gemma 2 2B IT
description: Punches far above its weight class in benchmarks and natural conversational flow.

name: Phi 3.5 Mini Instruct
description: Microsoft's 3.8B parameter model featuring a 128K token context window and strong reasoning.

name: DeepSeek R1 Distill 1.5B
description: Distilled reasoning model derived from DeepSeek R1 with step-by-step chain of thought.

name: DeepSeek R1 Distill 7B
description: DeepSeek R1 reasoning capabilities distilled into a 7B model. Takes full VRAM allocation.
